DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney James Magid for Defendant Deutsche Bank, National Trust Company the moving party. Attorney Jason W. Estavillo by Court Call for Plaintiff Ray P. Gaylord the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. The Court takes this matter under submission. The Moving Party is to submit two proposed orders, one as to "Without Leave to Amend" and the second as to "With Leave to Amend", both with the conditions set forth by Judge Quidachay in court this morning and in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).
Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Reporter Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR 12998. (501)

Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Continued To Jul-21-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jason Estavillo, Esq. (510-982-3001) for Plaintiff/opposing party Ray Parker Gaylord.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff requests a different date due to a conflict. ARGUED. The Court orders party to confer with the other side re: a different date. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to July 21, 2016. Opposition party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than June 30, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
